### Real on-device ASR (fused libelizainference + Metal)
[asr-real-smoke] lib=/Users/shawwalters/.local/state/eliza/local-inference/lib/libelizainference.dylib
[asr-real-smoke] bundle=/Users/shawwalters/.eliza/local-inference/models/eliza-1-0_8b.bundle
[asr-real-smoke] audio=/Users/shawwalters/eliza-workspace/eliza/eliza/plugins/plugin-local-inference/native/omnivoice.cpp/examples/freeman.wav
[asr-real-smoke] (975ms) "If you go into different cultures, they have different concepts of creation. They have their own creation story and of what an afterlife is, where you go, what you do, who you're gonna be with. People who say, "Well.""
[asr-real-smoke] words=39 sentences≈3
[asr-real-smoke] PASS

### Mixed real round-trip (cloud TTS -> LOCAL ASR -> Cerebras LLM -> cloud TTS)
[mixed-roundtrip] question: "What time is it right now in San Francisco"
[mixed-roundtrip] (cloud TTS question) 529ms, 78762 bytes pcm
[mixed-roundtrip] (LOCAL STT, eliza-1-asr) 345ms → "What time is it right now in San Francisco?"
[mixed-roundtrip] (cloud LLM, Cerebras gpt-oss-120b) 289ms → "I’m unable to provide the current time."
[mixed-roundtrip] (cloud TTS reply) 235ms, 37660 bytes mp3
[mixed-roundtrip] ── latency breakdown (real services) ──
  local STT (eliza-1-asr + Metal):   345 ms
  cloud LLM (Cerebras):              289 ms
  cloud TTS (ElevenLabs first audio):235 ms
  ── hybrid round-trip (STT+LLM+TTS): 869 ms
[mixed-roundtrip] PASS

### Real ASR WER under acoustic degradation (real speech + corpus DSP + eliza-1-asr)
[real-robustness] ── mean WER by condition (real eliza-1-asr) ──
  clean            mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  noise 10dB       mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  noise 5dB        mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  reverb 0.7       mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  far-field 12dB   mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  low-quality      mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  harsh (all)      mean WER = 0.083  (n=3)
  noise 0dB        mean WER = 0.000  (n=3)
  noise -6dB       mean WER = 0.048  (n=3)
  reverb 0.98      mean WER = 0.042  (n=3)
  destroyed        mean WER = 1.000  (n=3)

### Real voice-model stack (speaker recognition / diarization / VAD / local TTS)
[real-voice-stack] synthesizing real voices (ElevenLabs)…
[real-voice-stack] SPEAKER RECOGNITION (WeSpeaker 256-d):
  same speaker  (A1 vs A2): cosine = 0.719
  diff speakers (A1 vs B1): cosine = 0.208
  → PASS (same > diff by a clear margin)
[real-voice-stack] DIARIZATION (pyannote, 5 s 2-speaker window):
  frames=293 distinct non-silence powerset labels=1,2,3,4,5,6
  → PASS (diarizer produced speaker frames)
[real-voice-stack] VAD (Silero):
  speech max prob = 1.000, silence max prob = 0.009
  → PASS (speech scores above silence)
[real-voice-stack] LOCAL TTS (on-device, bundle default):
  synthesized 62400 samples (3.90s) in 3089ms, rms=0.0774
  → PASS
[real-voice-stack] PASS

### Agent self-voice rejection + overlapping/interrupting speakers (real models)
[agent-voice/overlap] A) AGENT SELF-VOICE (WeSpeaker):
  agent vs agent (different replies): cosine = 0.371  ← self-voice imprint
  agent vs user A:                    cosine = 0.155
  agent vs user B:                    cosine = -0.125
  → PASS (agent self-similarity exceeds agent-vs-human by 0.216 → echo is rejectable)
[agent-voice/overlap] B) OVERLAPPING SPEAKERS (pyannote):
  labels seen=2,4,5,6  overlap(≥4) frames=167/293
  → PASS (diarizer segments the simultaneous-speech mix; overlap pairs detected)
[agent-voice/overlap] PASS
